markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To improve the sprint process by tightening communication and project management.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New EM/ME Collaboration:** EMs and MEs will now partner on strategy (W2) and review performance (W6) to improve strategy quality and align tactical execution.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [**Accelerated Calibration:** The calibration article moves to W2 to provide more time for feedback and production, using a new RYG health system to flag delays.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [**Centralized PM in Notion:** Sprint project management will move from Linear to a custom Notion database, with HubSpot remaining the source of truth for client health and forecasting.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=2184.0)
  - [**PSEO Pricing Clarity:** A clear process is needed for advanced PSEO sprints (e.g., $40k vs. $18k editorial) to ensure teams deliver the full value from day one.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Topics

### EM/ME Collaboration

  - [**Problem:** EMs create content strategy in isolation, leading to tactical misalignment and missed opportunities for expert input from MEs.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [**Solution:** Formalize EM/ME collaboration at two key points:](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [**W2: Strategy Development:** EM & ME partner on the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Ensures strategies are tactically feasible and grounded in client data (e.g., internal databases, building codes), preventing production issues.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
      - [**W6: Performance Review:** EM & ME review sprint performance (GA, GSC) against the W2 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
          - [**Outcome:** A data-backed summary for the W7 conversion meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
          - [**Scope:** Must include an operational check of the content pipeline's performance.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)

### Calibration Process

  - [**Problem:** The W3 calibration article process is a bottleneck, often taking 1–4 weeks, which delays the entire sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [**Solution:** Accelerate the process to create more buffer time.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
      - [**New Timeline:** Calibration article sent to client by end of W2.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
      - [**Health Flags:** A RYG system will track progress to enable proactive intervention.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
          - [**Green:** Feedback received by early W3.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
          - [**Yellow:** No feedback by end of W3.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
          - [**Red:** No feedback by W4.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
      - [**Topic Selection:** EMs will select a non-core, underperforming article to rewrite.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This avoids client nitpicking on their main subject matter and provides a clear "before & after" comparison to demonstrate GrowthX's value.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

### Project Management & Health Scoring

  - [**Problem:** The current PM tool (Linear) is not being adopted, and there's no consistent, objective system for tracking sprint health.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=2184.0)
  - [**Solution 1: Notion for PM**](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=2184.0)
      - [**Tool:** Move sprint PM to a custom Notion database built by Leah.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=2332.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Leverages an existing tool and allows for a tailored, user-friendly structure.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=2332.0)
      - [**System:** HubSpot remains the source of truth for client health; Notion will be for granular task management.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [**Solution 2: Standardized Health Scoring**](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)
      - [**Method:** Adapt the pod team's 5-signal health score system for sprints.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provides a consistent, objective framework for tracking client health and forecasting conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)
      - [**Process:** Define clear criteria for each signal (1–5) and for the final RYG score.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=2676.0)
      - [**Contextual Override:** EMs must be trained to manually override the score based on external triggers (e.g., client acquisition, stakeholder changes).](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=2693.0)

### PSEO & Pricing Clarity

  - [**Problem:** Ambiguity exists around delivering advanced PSEO services within the standard sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**Solution:** Establish a clear process for PSEO-inclusive sprints.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Trigger:** Higher pricing (e.g., $40k vs. $18k editorial) signals a PSEO-inclusive sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Action:** Teams must deliver the full scope (editorial + PSEO) from day one.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
      - [**Resource:** If the standard EM/ME pair is insufficient, additional resources must be assigned to ensure on-time delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida & Sydney:** Define the ideal EM/ME collaboration workflow for strategy development (W2) and performance review (W6).](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=3236.0)
  - [**William:** Document the W6 performance review process, including the pipeline quality check.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=3572.0)
  - [**William, Aida, & Sydney:** Scope requirements for the new sprint PM database in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=3825.0)
  - [**William, Aida, & Sydney:** Define the standardized RYG health scoring system for sprints.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=2476.0)
  - [**William:** Get clarity on the pricing and operational model for the "check that" feature.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=3658.0)
  - [**All:** Implement the new W2 calibration process for upcoming clients.](https://fathom.video/share/2YBgsjv-W-rteDXc3MhvziufKQ_2-7Dm?tab=summary&timestamp=3101.0)
